headlines.title: Four swing House races in Pennsylvania loom large for both parties — and for 2028, too
headlines.description: Control of the House of Representatives could come down to four pivotal battleground races in Pennsylvania

headlines.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’
headlines.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

headlines.title: Teacher’s assistant at San Diego mosque recalls students’ bravery as gunmen banged on doors
headlines.description: Like schools across the U.S., the Islamic Center of San Diego had sought to prepare its students for the possibility that a gunman could breach its walls.

headlines.title: Health Officials Race to Trace Rising Ebola Cases in Central Africa
headlines.description: The American doctor who tested positive for Ebola while working in Congo has been evacuated to Berlin to receive emergency care. Health officials are racing to trace infections in Central Africa and worry the scale of the outbreak is already larger than first reported. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says Castro indictment is 'big step forward'
headlines.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche discusses the indictment of former Cuban President Raúl Castro, charged with the 1996 downing of two civilian planes. He called the move a "big step forward" for Cuban Americans.

headlines.title: End of an era as Schlitz, the beer that made Milwaukee famous, pours its last
headlines.description: It’s last call for Schlitz, the beer that made Milwaukee famous.

headlines.title: Bonds 101: What you need to know about the bond market
headlines.description: The stock market is near record highs, but there’s another corner of Wall Street that’s flashing warning signs: the bond market

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: The Savannah Bananas are bringing joy, baseball and a second chance at a dream
headlines.description: The Savannah Bananas are known for entertaining baseball fans with dancing and singing. But players also want make sure their skill and competitiveness is front and center.

headlines.title: Democratic group launches ICE attack against Rep. Angie Craig in Minnesota Senate primary
headlines.description: A Democratic outside group is unleashing an early attack on one of the contenders in the hotly contested Minnesota Senate primary, underscoring how the fight for the future of the party is reaching new heights.

headlines.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’
headlines.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

headlines.title: Why Democrats have soured on a women’s history museum bill set for a House vote
headlines.description: Republicans amended the bill to say President Trump may pick an alternative site for the museum and specified it could include only “biological women.”
